address.address: F-12, Jhoomar Ghat, Near Hotel Mashal, A.B. Road, Rau India
address.map_location: College of Dental Science & Hospital , Indore

pos_sentences: The one pursuing mds, it would have been great if we got some scholarship opportunities from the government, for financial support.
A lot of festivals are celebrated timely and it's so much fun and positive environment among the students.
Hostels are absolutely superb and have a very good staff who are very cooperative.

The admission was easy and convenient the college itself was very helpful throughout the requirement for admission was min 50%in all pcb subjects the applications are received online and are very easy to fill
Our college is providing us best faculty and education which is really good and best for our future.
The admission process was very smooth, all teachers n faculty were very much supportive and kind.
Faculties of various branches of dentistry are of great help during the internship.
Most importantly college is having a maximum number of patients at opd which helps students to become well-trained in clinical subjects.
neg_sentences: The washroom are so dirty they don't provide hand wash in washrooms they are dirty everytime and smells horrible
Small campus area and sometimes the projector of class will not work properly
Everytime time they will ask for money for everything even for a gloves, headcap or mask
